name: HWR_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_B
description: The job run table stores information about each execution of a scheduled job.

columns.Name: JOB_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table. The number should be generated from the sequence.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the scheduled job.

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of the scheduled job.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date that this job is scheduled to start.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The end date for this job, if it is recurring.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: This is a code indicating the status of the scheduled job.

columns.Name: RESULT
columns.Comments: This is the result of the job execution.

columns.Name: PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: This is the set of serialized parameters of the job.

columns.Name: IS_CANCELABLE
columns.Comments: This value indicates whether the job is cancelable.

columns.Name: APPLICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the application code of the job.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
